is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

has_community_right_of_free_movement.name: has_community_right_of_free_movement
has_community_right_of_free_movement.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and does not enjoy the Community right of free movement.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or residence.

is_subject_of_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

is_subject_of_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_international_protection_p.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_of_responsibility_determinati.name: is_subject_of_responsibility_determination_procedure
is_subject_of_responsibility_determinati.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

has_risk_of_absconding.name: has_risk_of_absconding
has_risk_of_absconding.description: There are reasons to believe the alien will abscond, established by individual examination and at least one objective criterion.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien meets at least one of the identification criteria: valid travel document, recognition by national authority, or falls within a nationality category for ministerial laissez-passer.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_by_national_authority_willing.name: recognised_by_national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
recognised_by_national_authority_willing.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_.name: falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

criterion_no_residence_application_after.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
criterion_no_residence_application_after.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal residence, or has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

criterion_used_false_information_or_docu.name: criterion_used_false_information_or_documents
criterion_used_false_information_or_docu.description: The person has used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal.

criterion_declared_or_failed_to_comply_w.name: criterion_declared_or_failed_to_comply_with_measure
criterion_declared_or_failed_to_comply_w.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

criterion_subject_of_active_entry_ban.name: criterion_subject_of_active_entry_ban
criterion_subject_of_active_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_new_application_after_negative.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
criterion_new_application_after_negative.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating residence, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on responsibility determination for international protection applications.

criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_concealed_prior_international_.name: criterion_concealed_prior_international_protection_application
criterion_concealed_prior_international_.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations on responsibility determination.

criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_.name: criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is established for the person.

is_subject_of_relevant_procedure.name: is_subject_of_relevant_procedure
is_subject_of_relevant_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a responsibility determination/transfer procedure.
